root_text.sn46.18:1.1: “Yesaṁ kesañci, bhikkhave, satta bojjhaṅgā viraddhā, viraddho tesaṁ ariyo maggo sammā dukkhakkhayagāmī.
root_text.sn46.18:1.2: Yesaṁ kesañci, bhikkhave, satta bojjhaṅgā āraddhā, āraddho tesaṁ ariyo maggo sammā dukkhakkhayagāmī.
root_text.sn46.18:1.5: yesaṁ kesañci, bhikkhave, ime satta bojjhaṅgā viraddhā, viraddho tesaṁ ariyo maggo sammā dukkhakkhayagāmī.
root_text.sn46.18:1.6: Yesaṁ kesañci, bhikkhave, ime satta bojjhaṅgā āraddhā, āraddho tesaṁ ariyo maggo sammā dukkhakkhayagāmī”ti.

translation_text.sn46.18:1.1: “Mendicants, whoever has missed out on the seven awakening factors has missed out on the noble path to the complete ending of suffering.
translation_text.sn46.18:1.2: Whoever has undertaken the seven awakening factors has undertaken the noble path to the complete ending of suffering.
translation_text.sn46.18:1.4: The awakening factors of mindfulness, investigation of principles, energy, rapture, tranquility, immersion, and equanimity.
translation_text.sn46.18:1.5: Whoever has missed out on these seven awakening factors has missed out on the noble path to the complete ending of suffering.
translation_text.sn46.18:1.6: Whoever has undertaken these seven awakening factors has undertaken the noble path to the complete ending of suffering.”
